description: Minimum stable feature schema for books-state derived research features.

features.midpoint: mid_price if already present, otherwise recomputed.
features.microprice_proxy: (best_ask_price * best_bid_size + best_bid_price * best_ask_size) / (best_bid_size + best_ask_size) when denominator > 0.
features.staleness_flag: 1 if bid/ask missing, spread <= 0, timestamp age exceeds threshold, hash repeats too long (> 2), or last_trade_price missing too long (> 2 consecutive snapshots).
features.market_quality_score: Simple first-pass diagnostic score: add points for tight spread, both sides populated, and nonzero top sizes; subtract points for empty levels, pathological spread, and stale rows.
